content:
I am pleased to share that the Hon'ble Patna High Court has been pleased to grant regular bail in Criminal Miscellaneous No. 11415 of 2026, involving allegations under Section 80(2) (dowry death) and Section 3(5) of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 (BNS).
The matter was heard and decided by Hon'ble Mr. Justice Ansul.
